title: stelis uberis
intro: Stelis uberis, also known as the Yellow Bee Orchid, is a flowering plant species belonging to the orchid family. Traditionally, Stelis uberis has been used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Stelis uberis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized in a variety of ways.
